description: Runtime boundary exemption registry for Tier 1 static import analysis.

schema.rule_id: The boundary rule identifier (R01-R12) being exempted.
schema.source_file: Relative path to the source file containing the exempted import.
schema.forbidden_import: The exact forbidden module name being imported.
schema.adr_reference: Optional ADR document reference justifying the exemption.
schema.active: Boolean flag; set to false to disable an expired exemption.
schema.expires: Optional expiration date (ISO 8601) after which the exemption must be reviewed.

exemptions.reason: Pre-existing: API Runtime imports contracts API schema. Requires ADR to define contracts as shared utility package.
Pre-existing: API Runtime imports contracts payloads. Requires ADR to define contracts as shared utility package.
Pre-existing: API Runtime imports service module. Requires ADR or service extraction to Workflow Runtime.
Pre-existing: API Runtime imports telemetry module. Requires ADR or telemetry extraction to Monitoring Runtime.
